title: Quantum Neural Networks: Architectures and Expressibility
description: Comprehensive exploration of quantum neural network architectures, including parameterized quantum circuits, expressibility measures, and the relationship to classical neural networks.
learningObjectives: Design QNN architectures for different learning tasks
Quantify circuit expressibility and entangling capability
Understand the relationship between QNNs and classical neural networks
Analyze the representational power of quantum circuits
Implement and compare different QNN architectures
